title: /Users/masayuki/Dev/claude-config/.claude 内容を表示せよ
summary_text: - **Critical:** CI can pass without validating global prompt content because `ALLOW_MISSING_GLOBAL_PROMPTS=1` is set in both gate workflows, and the check scripts explicitly skip prompt-content assertions (and smoke) when `~/.codex/prompts/*` is missing. This makes CI unable to enforce the actual SSOT contract. [fugue-orchestration-gate.yml](/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator/.github/workflows/fugue-orchestration-gate.yml:143) [fugue-orchestration-gate.yml](/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator-feed-runner/.github/workflows/fugue-orchestration-gate.yml:93) [check-codex-kernel-prompt.sh](/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator/scripts/check-codex-kernel-prompt.sh:122) [check-codex-vote-prompt.sh](/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator/scripts/check-codex-vote-prompt.sh:122) [check-codex-kernel-prompt.sh](/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator-feed-runner/scripts/check-codex-kernel-prompt.sh:120) [check-codex-vote-prompt.sh](/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator-feed-runner/scripts/check-codex-vote-prompt.sh:120) - **High:** After removing repo-local prompt files from workflow path filters, prompt changes in SSOT (`~/.codex/prompts/*`) are no longer CI-triggered by repo changes. Combined with the skip mode above, prompt drift can silently bypass repo CI. [fugue-orchestration-gate.yml](/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator/.github/workflows/fugue-orchestration-gate.yml:56) [fugue-orchestration-gate.yml](/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator-feed-runner/.github/workflows/fugue-orchestration-gate.yml:34) - **High:** Smoke validation does not prove adapter resolution source strongly enough. It executes `codex exec "/kernel|/vote ..."` and checks marker strings, but does not verify that execution actually came from `~/.codex/prompts/*` (vs other runtime slash handling/cached behavior). [check-codex-kernel-prompt.sh](/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator/scripts/check-codex-kernel-prompt.sh:78) [check-codex-kernel-prompt.sh](/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator/scripts/check-codex-kernel-prompt.sh:154) [check-codex-vote-prompt.sh](/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator/scripts/check-codex-vote-prompt.sh:78) [check-codex-vote-prompt.sh](/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator/scripts/check-codex-vote-prompt.sh:148) [check-codex-kernel-prompt.sh](/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator-feed-runner/scripts/check-codex-kernel-prompt.sh:78) [check-codex-vote-prompt.sh](/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator-feed-runner/scripts/check-codex-vote-prompt.sh:78) - **Medium:** Harness trigger matching now hardcodes a user-specific absolute path to global prompts, which is brittle across machines/users and can silently disable intended local checks in non-`/Users/masayuki` environments. [fugue-harness-hook.sh](/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator/scripts/harness/fugue-harness-hook.sh:81) [fugue-harness-hook.sh](/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator/scripts/harness/fugue-harness-hook.sh:86)
